description: Agentic underwriting condition evaluator. Runs AFTER preconditions. Given loan conditions and the documents the borrower submitted (rack & stack output), plus the loan scenario and eligibility output, determine whether each condition is Fulfilled, Partially Fulfilled, Unfulfilled, or Needs Review.

steps.name: Intake & Normalization
steps.description: Parse the conditions, the submitted documents (rack & stack output), the loan scenario (MISMO XML), and the eligibility output. Normalize categories and build an evaluation scenario summary.

steps.name: Candidate Matching (Cheap Filter)
steps.description: Link conditions to the documents that may satisfy them. Pre-links from each condition's result_document_ids are authoritative; a deterministic keyword pass and LLM triage supplement them.

steps.name: Income Condition Evaluation
steps.description: Deep fulfillment evaluation for income-category conditions against their candidate documents.

steps.name: Assets & Reserves Condition Evaluation
steps.description: Deep fulfillment evaluation for asset/reserves-category conditions against their candidate documents.

steps.name: Credit Condition Evaluation
steps.description: Deep fulfillment evaluation for credit-category conditions (including identity, housing history, undisclosed property) against their candidate documents.

steps.name: Property Condition Evaluation
steps.description: Deep fulfillment evaluation for property-category conditions (appraisal, title, insurance, taxes, purchase agreement, flood) against their candidate documents.

steps.name: Misc & Other Condition Evaluation
steps.description: Deep fulfillment evaluation for miscellaneous/other-category conditions against their candidate documents.

steps.name: Aggregation & Human-in-the-Loop Packaging
steps.description: Merge all per-condition evaluations, normalize verdicts, derive overall status, flag low-confidence/ambiguous items for human review, compute stats, and assemble the final output.
